languages.text: 大軍事派に、強者は帝国でまともな生活を築けることを説明した。
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the strong can earn themselves a decent existence in the Imperium.

traits.locale_text: 大軍事派に、強者は帝国でまともな生活を築けることを説明した。

languages.text: 向首席战士解释称，在帝国里，强者可以为自己挣得体面的生活。
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the strong can earn themselves a decent existence in the Imperium.

traits.locale_text: 向首席战士解释称，在帝国里，强者可以为自己挣得体面的生活。

languages.text: Başmilitan'a, güçlü olanın İmparatorluk'ta insana yakışır bir yaşam sürdürebileceğini açıkladın.
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the strong can earn themselves a decent existence in the Imperium.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan'a, güçlü olanın İmparatorluk'ta insana yakışır bir yaşam sürdürebileceğini açıkladın.

languages.text: Explicaste a tu Archimilitante que los fuertes pueden alcanzar una existencia decente en el Imperium.
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the strong can earn themselves a decent existence in the Imperium.

traits.locale_text: Explicaste a tu Archimilitante que los fuertes pueden alcanzar una existencia decente en el Imperium.

languages.text: Vous avez expliqué à l'archimilitant que les plus forts pouvaient se tailler une existence décente au sein de l'Imperium.
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the strong can earn themselves a decent existence in the Imperium.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez expliqué à l'archimilitant que les plus forts pouvaient se tailler une existence décente au sein de l'Imperium.

languages.text: Dem Erzmilitanten erklärt, dass sich die Starken innerhalb des Imperiums eine respektable Existenz aufbauen können.
